paradigm: beat 'em up with platformer and puzzle elements

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic for defeating enemies throughout all levels
Up to 3 items can be stored; essential for puzzle progression and combat
Used to discover hidden items by peeling back comic pages
Combat enhancement items found throughout levels
Only healing consumable; critical resource management item
Unique environmental interaction - tearing pages into weapons
Alternate progression method requiring item use or environmental interaction
Optional path selection that converges back to main progression
Instant death hazard requiring careful platforming
Final boss scenario with environmental hazard

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced action interspersed with puzzle-solving and exploration; tension builds through cumulative damage and resource scarcity; relief provided by successful obstacle completion

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Branching panel paths that converge back to main progression; optional exploration using Roadkill to find hidden items within panels
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden items discoverable by using Roadkill to peel back page sections; secondary panels accessible through player choice

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like introduction of combat and item mechanics with manageable enemy encounters and simple puzzles
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increasing enemy density and variety; puzzle complexity increases; resource management becomes critical as health depletion progresses
difficulty_curve.late_game: Peak difficulty with sustained enemy encounters; introduction of environmental hazards (pits, rising liquid); climactic boss battle requiring mastery of all mechanics
notable_spikes: Episode transitions (end of levels 2, 4) requiring completion for continue acquisition
Level 6 finale - Mortus boss fight with rising liquid chamber hazard
High perceived difficulty criticized by reviewers as potential barrier to completion

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level consists of sequential comic panels that function as micro-stages; player must clear enemies or solve puzzles in each panel to advance; occasional branching paths create choice moments
Panels typically contain either enemy encounters or puzzles, not both; player must defeat all enemies to exit a panel or find alternate solutions
Items hidden within panels accessible via Roadkill interaction; rewards exploration and thorough panel searching
Six levels divided into three two-level episodes; completion of each episode awards a continue, structuring difficulty and progression around episode boundaries
Early levels feature combat and puzzle mechanics; later levels introduce hazards (pits, obstacles); final level combines all elements with climactic boss encounter
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 1 (tutorial-like) to Level 6 (all mechanics + boss + hazards)
